title: selaginella limbata
intro: Selaginella limbata, also known as the golden club moss or golden spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow, club-shaped leaves. Traditionally, Selaginella limbata has been used in herbal medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of the plant are said to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Selaginella limbata is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder for topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
